import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx");import __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=f8a8ace4"; const Fragment = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["Fragment"]; const jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import __vite__cjsImport1_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=f8a8ace4"; const React = __vite__cjsImport1_react.__esModule ? __vite__cjsImport1_react.default : __vite__cjsImport1_react; const useState = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useState"]; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useEffect"]; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useRef"];
import { Link, useNavigate } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-router-dom.js?v=f8a8ace4";
import { productApi, categoryApi, attributeApi } from "/src/services/api.js";
import AccountSelector from "/src/components/AccountSelector.jsx";
import { useAuth } from "/src/context/AuthContext.jsx";
import Pagination from "/src/components/Pagination.jsx";
const TYPE_LABELS = {
  simple: { label: "Sản phẩm đơn", cls: "bg-stone/10 text-stone border-stone/20" },
  configurable: { label: "Sản phẩm có biến thể", cls: "bg-primary/15 text-primary border-primary/30" },
  grouped: { label: "Nhóm sản phẩm", cls: "bg-umber/15 text-umber border-umber/30" },
  bundle: { label: "Bộ sản phẩm (Combo)", cls: "bg-gold/20 text-gold border-gold/30" },
  virtual: { label: "Dịch vụ/Phi vật thể", cls: "bg-brick/10 text-brick border-brick/20" },
  downloadable: { label: "Tài liệu/Dữ liệu số", cls: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200" }
};
const DEFAULT_COLUMNS = [
  { id: "sku", label: "Mã SP", minWidth: "130px", fixed: true },
  { id: "name", label: "Tên Sản Phẩm", minWidth: "220px", fixed: true },
  { id: "cost_price", label: "Giá nhập", minWidth: "120px" },
  { id: "price", label: "Giá bán", minWidth: "120px" },
  { id: "image", label: "Ảnh", minWidth: "80px" },
  { id: "type", label: "Loại hình", minWidth: "110px" },
  { id: "category", label: "Danh mục", minWidth: "120px" },
  { id: "stock", label: "Tồn kho", minWidth: "80px" },
  { id: "is_featured", label: "Nổi bật", minWidth: "80px", align: "center" },
  { id: "is_new", label: "Mới", minWidth: "80px", align: "center" },
  { id: "actions", label: "Thao tác", minWidth: "100px", align: "right", fixed: true }
];
const ProductList = () => {
  _s();
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const filterRef = useRef(null);
  const columnSettingsRef = useRef(null);
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [allAttributes, setAllAttributes] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState([]);
  const [showAdvanced, setShowAdvanced] = useState(false);
  const [showColumnSettings, setShowColumnSettings] = useState(false);
  const [isTrashView, setIsTrashView] = useState(false);
  const [copiedText, setCopiedText] = useState(null);
  const handleCopy = (text, e) => {
    if (e) e.stopPropagation();
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedText(text);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedText(null), 2e3);
  };
  const [draggedItemIndex, setDraggedItemIndex] = useState(null);
  const [columnWidths, setColumnWidths] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem("product_list_column_widths");
    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : {};
  });
  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem("product_list_sort");
    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : { key: "id", direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
  });
  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState(null);
  const [editValue, setEditValue] = useState("");
  const [justUpdatedId, setJustUpdatedId] = useState(null);
  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState([]);
  const [availableColumns, setAvailableColumns] = useState([]);
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({
    current_page: 1,
    last_page: 1,
    total: 0,
    per_page: 20
  });
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState({
    search: "",
    category_id: "",
    type: "",
    is_featured: "",
    is_new: "",
    min_price: "",
    max_price: "",
    min_stock: "",
    max_stock: "",
    start_date: "",
    end_date: "",
    attributes: {}
    // { attribute_id: [values] }
  });
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchInitialData();
    fetchProducts(1);
  }, []);
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
      if (filterRef.current && !filterRef.current.contains(event.target) && !event.target.closest("[data-filter-btn]")) {
        setShowAdvanced(false);
      }
      if (columnSettingsRef.current && !columnSettingsRef.current.contains(event.target) && !event.target.closest("[data-column-settings-btn]")) {
        setShowColumnSettings(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    };
  }, []);
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
      if (e.key === "Escape") {
        setShowAdvanced(false);
        setShowColumnSettings(false);
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
  }, []);
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProducts(1);
  }, [isTrashView]);
  const fetchInitialData = async () => {
    try {
      const accountId = localStorage.getItem("activeAccountId");
      const catCacheKey = `product_cat_cache_${accountId}`;
      const attrCacheKey = `product_attr_cache_${accountId}`;
      let categoriesData, attributesData;
      const cachedCats = localStorage.getItem(catCacheKey);
      const cachedAttrs = localStorage.getItem(attrCacheKey);
      if (cachedCats && cachedAttrs) {
        categoriesData = JSON.parse(cachedCats);
        attributesData = JSON.parse(cachedAttrs);
      } else {
        const [catRes, attrRes] = await Promise.all(
          [
            categoryApi.getAll(),
            attributeApi.getAll()
          ]
        );
        categoriesData = catRes.data;
        attributesData = attrRes.data;
        localStorage.setItem(catCacheKey, JSON.stringify(categoriesData));
        localStorage.setItem(attrCacheKey, JSON.stringify(attributesData));
      }
      setCategories(categoriesData);
      setAllAttributes(attributesData);
      const attrColumns = attributesData.map((attr) => ({
        id: `attr_${attr.id}`,
        label: attr.name,
        minWidth: "100px",
        isAttribute: true,
        attrId: attr.id
      }));
      const combinedColumns = [...DEFAULT_COLUMNS.slice(0, -1), ...attrColumns, DEFAULT_COLUMNS[DEFAULT_COLUMNS.length - 1]];
      const savedOrder = localStorage.getItem("product_column_order");
      let sortedColumns = combinedColumns;
      if (savedOrder) {
        const orderIds = JSON.parse(savedOrder);
        sortedColumns = [...combinedColumns].sort((a, b) => {
          const indexA = orderIds.indexOf(a.id);
          const indexB = orderIds.indexOf(b.id);
          if (indexA === -1 && indexB === -1) return 0;
          if (indexA === -1) return 1;
          if (indexB === -1) return -1;
          return indexA - indexB;
        });
      }
      setAvailableColumns(sortedColumns);
      const savedColumns = localStorage.getItem("product_list_columns");
      const allIds = sortedColumns.map((c) => c.id);
      if (savedColumns) {
        const savedIds = JSON.parse(savedColumns);
        const missingIds = allIds.filter((id) => !savedIds.includes(id));
        if (missingIds.length > 0) {
          const updatedVisible = [...savedIds, ...missingIds];
          setVisibleColumns(updatedVisible);
          localStorage.setItem("product_list_columns", JSON.stringify(updatedVisible));
        } else {
          setVisibleColumns(savedIds);
        }
      } else {
        setVisibleColumns(allIds);
        localStorage.setItem("product_list_columns", JSON.stringify(allIds));
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching initial data", error);
    }
  };
  const fetchProducts = async (page = 1, currentFilters = filters, currentSort = sortConfig) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const params = {
        ...currentFilters,
        page,
        per_page: pagination.per_page,
        trashed: isTrashView ? 1 : 0,
        sort_by: currentSort.direction === "none" ? "id" : currentSort.key,
        sort_order: currentSort.direction === "none" ? "desc" : currentSort.direction
      };
      if (params.attributes) {
        Object.entries(params.attributes).forEach(([id, val]) => {
          if (val && val.length > 0) {
            params[`attributes[${id}]`] = Array.isArray(val) ? val.join(",") : val;
          }
        });
        delete params.attributes;
      }
      Object.keys(params).forEach((key) => {
        if (params[key] === "" || params[key] === null || params[key] === void 0) {
          delete params[key];
        }
      });
      const response = await productApi.getAll(params);
      setProducts(response.data.data);
      setPagination({
        current_page: response.data.current_page,
        last_page: response.data.last_page,
        total: response.data.total,
        per_page: response.data.per_page
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching admin products", error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };
  const handleFilterChange = (e) => {
    const { name, value } = e.target;
    setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
  };
  const toggleSelectAll = () => {
    if (selectedIds.length === products.length) {
      setSelectedIds([]);
    } else {
      setSelectedIds(products.map((p) => p.id));
    }
  };
  const toggleSelectProduct = (id) => {
    setSelectedIds(
      (prev) => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter((item) => item !== id) : [...prev, id]
    );
  };
  const handleBulkDelete = async () => {
    if (!window.confirm(`Quý khách có chắc chắn muốn xóa ${selectedIds.length} sản phẩm đã chọn không?`)) return;
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      await Promise.all(selectedIds.map((id) => productApi.destroy(id)));
      setSelectedIds([]);
      fetchProducts(pagination.current_page);
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa hàng loạt.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };
  const handleBulkDuplicate = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      await Promise.all(selectedIds.map((id) => productApi.duplicate(id)));
      setSelectedIds([]);
      fetchProducts(pagination.current_page);
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Có lỗi xảy ra khi sao chép hàng loạt.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };
  const handleAttributeFilterChange = (attrId, value) => {
    setFilters((prev) => {
      const currentValues = prev.attributes[attrId] || [];
      let newValues;
      if (currentValues.includes(value)) {
        newValues = currentValues.filter((v) => v !== value);
      } else {
        newValues = [...currentValues, value];
      }
      return {
        ...prev,
        attributes: {
          ...prev.attributes,
          [attrId]: newValues
        }
      };
    });
  };
  const handleReset = () => {
    const resetFilters = {
      search: "",
      category_id: "",
      type: "",
      is_featured: "",
      is_new: "",
      min_price: "",
      max_price: "",
      min_stock: "",
      max_stock: "",
      start_date: "",
      end_date: "",
      attributes: {}
    };
    const defaultSort = { key: "id", direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
    setFilters(resetFilters);
    setSortConfig(defaultSort);
    localStorage.removeItem("product_list_filters");
    fetchProducts(1, resetFilters, defaultSort);
  };
  const handleRefresh = () => {
    const defaultSort = { key: "id", direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
    setSortConfig(defaultSort);
    fetchProducts(1, filters, defaultSort);
  };
  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    if (!window.confirm("Quý khách có chắc chắn muốn xóa sản phẩm này không?")) return;
    try {
      await productApi.destroy(id);
      fetchProducts(pagination.current_page);
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa sản phẩm.");
    }
  };
  const handleDuplicate = async (id) => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      await productApi.duplicate(id);
      fetchProducts(pagination.current_page);
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Có lỗi xảy ra khi sao chép sản phẩm.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };
  const handleSaveInlineEdit = async () => {
    if (!editingCell) return;
    const { id, field } = editingCell;
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      await productApi.update(id, { [field]: editValue });
      setProducts((prev) => prev.map((p) => p.id === id ? { ...p, [field]: editValue } : p));
      setJustUpdatedId(id);
      setTimeout(() => setJustUpdatedId(null), 2e3);
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Lỗi khi cập nhật sản phẩm!");
    } finally {
      setEditingCell(null);
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };
  const getPrimaryImage = (product) => {
    const primary = product.images?.find((img) => img.is_primary);
    return primary?.image_url || product.images?.[0]?.image_url || null;
  };
  const toggleColumn = (columnId) => {
    let newVisible;
    if (visibleColumns.includes(columnId)) {
      newVisible = visibleColumns.filter((id) => id !== columnId);
    } else {
      newVisible = [...visibleColumns, columnId];
    }
    setVisibleColumns(newVisible);
    localStorage.setItem("product_list_columns", JSON.stringify(newVisible));
  };
  const moveColumn = (index, direction) => {
    const newAvailable = [...availableColumns];
    const newIndex = index + direction;
    if (newIndex < 0 || newIndex >= newAvailable.length) return;
    const temp = newAvailable[index];
    newAvailable[index] = newAvailable[newIndex];
    newAvailable[newIndex] = temp;
    setAvailableColumns(newAvailable);
    localStorage.setItem("product_column_order", JSON.stringify(newAvailable.map((c) => c.id)));
  };
  const handleDragStart = (e, index) => {
    setDraggedItemIndex(index);
    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = "move";
    e.target.style.opacity = "0.5";
  };
  const handleDragOver = (e, index) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = "move";
  };
  const handleDrop = (e, index) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (draggedItemIndex === null || draggedItemIndex === index) return;
    const newAvailable = [...availableColumns];
    const draggedItem = newAvailable[draggedItemIndex];
    newAvailable.splice(draggedItemIndex, 1);
    newAvailable.splice(index, 0, draggedItem);
    setAvailableColumns(newAvailable);
    setDraggedItemIndex(null);
    localStorage.setItem("product_column_order", JSON.stringify(newAvailable.map((c) => c.id)));
  };
  const handleDragEnd = (e) => {
    e.target.style.opacity = "1";
    setDraggedItemIndex(null);
  };
  const handleHeaderDragStart = (e, index) => {
    setDraggedItemIndex(index);
    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = "move";
  };
  const handleHeaderDrop = (e, targetIndex) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (draggedItemIndex === null || draggedItemIndex === targetIndex) return;
    const currentRendered = availableColumns.filter((c) => visibleColumns.includes(c.id));
    const draggedCol = currentRendered[draggedItemIndex];
    const targetCol = currentRendered[targetIndex];
    if (!draggedCol || !targetCol) return;
    const newAvailable = [...availableColumns];
    const draggedIdxInAvailable = newAvailable.findIndex((c) => c.id === draggedCol.id);
    newAvailable.splice(draggedIdxInAvailable, 1);
    const targetIdxInAvailable = newAvailable.findIndex((c) => c.id === targetCol.id);
    newAvailable.splice(targetIdxInAvailable, 0, draggedCol);
    setAvailableColumns(newAvailable);
    localStorage.setItem("product_column_order", JSON.stringify(newAvailable.map((c) => c.id)));
    setDraggedItemIndex(null);
  };
  const handleColumnResize = (colId, e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    const startX = e.clientX;
    const startWidth = columnWidths[colId] || e.currentTarget.parentElement.offsetWidth;
    let currentWidth = startWidth;
    const onMouseMove = (moveEvent) => {
      currentWidth = Math.max(30, startWidth + (moveEvent.clientX - startX));
      setColumnWidths((prev) => ({ ...prev, [colId]: currentWidth }));
    };
    const onMouseUp = () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp);
      setColumnWidths((prev) => {
        const final = { ...prev, [colId]: currentWidth };
        localStorage.setItem("product_list_column_widths", JSON.stringify(final));
        return final;
      });
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
    document.addEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp);
  };
  const handleSort = (columnId) => {
    const validSortColumns = ["id", "sku", "name", "price", "cost_price", "stock_quantity", "created_at", "type"];
    let key = columnId;
    if (key === "stock") key = "stock_quantity";
    if (!validSortColumns.includes(key)) return;
    let newSort;
    if (sortConfig.key !== key) {
      newSort = { key, direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
    } else {
      const nextPhase = (sortConfig.phase || 1) % 3 + 1;
      if (nextPhase === 3) {
        newSort = { key: "id", direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
      } else {
        newSort = { key, direction: nextPhase === 2 ? "asc" : "desc", phase: nextPhase };
      }
    }
    setSortConfig(newSort);
    localStorage.setItem("product_list_sort", JSON.stringify(newSort));
    fetchProducts(1, filters, newSort);
  };
  const SortIndicator = ({ colId }) => {
    let currentKey = colId;
    if (currentKey === "stock") currentKey = "stock_quantity";
    if (sortConfig.key !== currentKey || sortConfig.direction === "none") return null;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "material-symbols-outlined text-[14px] text-primary", children: sortConfig.direction === "asc" ? "arrow_upward" : "arrow_downward" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
      lineNumber: 530,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };
  const getAttributeValue = (product, attrId) => {
    const valObj = product.attribute_values?.find((av) => av.attribute_id === attrId);
    if (!valObj) return "-";
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(valObj.value);
      return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.join(", ") : parsed;
    } catch (e) {
      return valObj.value;
    }
  };
  const renderedColumns = availableColumns.filter((col) => visibleColumns.includes(col.id));
  const totalTableWidth = renderedColumns.reduce((acc, col) => {
    const width = columnWidths[col.id] || col.minWidth;
    const numericWidth = typeof width === "string" ? parseInt(width.replace("px", "")) : width || 0;
    return acc + numericWidth;
  }, 40);
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "absolute inset-0 flex flex-col bg-[#fcfcfa] animate-fade-in p-6 z-10 w-full h-full", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("style", { children: `
                    @keyframes refresh-spin {
                        from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
                        to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
                    }
                    .animate-refresh-spin {
                        animation: refresh-spin 0.8s linear infinite;
                    }

                    /* Custom Scrollbar like OrderList */
                    .table-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {
                        width: 8px;
                        height: 8px;
                    }
                    .table-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
                        background: rgba(182, 143, 84, 0.05);
                    }
                    .table-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
                        background: rgba(182, 143, 84, 0.2);
                        border-radius: 4px;
                        border: 2px solid transparent;
                        background-clip: content-box;
                    }
                    .table-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
                        background: rgba(182, 143, 84, 0.4);
                        border: 2px solid transparent;
                        background-clip: content-box;
                    }

                    /* Grid Lines Styling */
                    .table-grid {
                        border-collapse: collapse;
                    }
                    .table-grid th, .table-grid td {
                        border: 1px solid rgba(182, 143, 84, 0.15);
                    }

                    /* Sticky Columns */
                    .sticky-col-0 { position: sticky; left: 0; z-index: 10; background: #fcfcfa; }
                    .sticky-col-1 { position: sticky; left: 40px; z-index: 10; background: #fcfcfa; }
                    .sticky-col-2 { position: sticky; left: 170px; z-index: 10; background: #fcfcfa; }
                    
                    /* Background for sticky columns on hover/select */
                    tr:hover .sticky-col-0, tr:hover .sticky-col-1, tr:hover .sticky-col-2 { background-color: #f9f7f2 !important; }
                    tr.bg-gold/10 .sticky-col-0, tr.bg-gold/10 .sticky-col-1, tr.bg-gold/10 .sticky-col-2 { background-color: #f7f1e6 !important; }
                    
                    thead th.sticky-col-0, thead th.sticky-col-1, thead th.sticky-col-2 { z-index: 30; }

                    /* Price Styling Classes */
                    .purchase-price {
                        color: #475569; /* Slate-600 - Professional muted navy/gray */
                    }
                    .sale-price {
                        color: #c2410c; /* Mặc định text-brick */
                    }
                ` }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
      lineNumber: 558,
      columnNumber: 13
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex-none bg-[#fcfcfa] pb-4 space-y-2", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex justify-between items-center mb-1", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("h1", { className: "text-2xl font-display font-bold text-primary italic", children: "Quản lý sản phẩm" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
          lineNumber: 620,
          columnNumber: 21
        }, this),
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "hidden md:block scale-90 origin-right", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(AccountSelector, { user }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
          lineNumber: 622,
          columnNumber: 25
        }, this) }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
          lineNumber: 621,
          columnNumber: 21
        }, this)
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
        lineNumber: 619,
        columnNumber: 17
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "bg-white border border-gold/10 p-2 shadow-sm rounded-sm", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex items-center gap-2", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex gap-1.5 items-center", children: [
          !isTrashView && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
            "button",
            {
              onClick: () => navigate("/admin/products/new"),
              className: "bg-brick text-white p-1.5 hover:bg-umber transition-all flex items-center justify-center rounded-sm w-9 h-9 shadow-sm",

      }, this),
      (() => {
        const activeFilters = [];
        if (filters.search) activeFilters.push({ key: "search", label: `Tìm: ${filters.search}` });
        if (filters.category_id) {
          const cat = categories.find((c) => c.id.toString() === filters.category_id.toString());
          activeFilters.push({ key: "category_id", label: `Danh mục: ${cat ? cat.name : filters.category_id}` });
        }
        if (filters.type) {
          const typeInfo = TYPE_LABELS[filters.type];
          activeFilters.push({ key: "type", label: `Loại: ${typeInfo ? typeInfo.label : filters.type}` });
        }
        if (filters.min_stock) activeFilters.push({ key: "min_stock", label: `Kho từ: ${filters.min_stock}` });
        if (filters.max_stock) activeFilters.push({ key: "max_stock", label: `Kho đến: ${filters.max_stock}` });
        if (filters.start_date) activeFilters.push({ key: "start_date", label: `Từ: ${filters.start_date}` });
        if (filters.end_date) activeFilters.push({ key: "end_date", label: `Đến: ${filters.end_date}` });
        Object.keys(filters.attributes).forEach((attrId) => {
          const val = filters.attributes[attrId];
          if (val && (Array.isArray(val) ? val.length > 0 : val !== "")) {
            const attr = allAttributes.find((a) => a.id.toString() === attrId.toString());
            const valLabel = Array.isArray(val) ? val.join(", ") : val;
            activeFilters.push({ key: "attr", attrId, label: `${attr ? attr.name : "TT"}: ${valLabel}` });
          }
        });
        if (activeFilters.length === 0) return null;
        return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex flex-wrap gap-2 px-4 py-2 border-b border-stone/10 bg-stone/5 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-1 duration-200", children: [
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "text-[11px] font-bold text-stone/40 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1 mt-1", children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "material-symbols-outlined text-[14px]", children: "filter_alt" }, void 0, false, {
              fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
              lineNumber: 763,
              columnNumber: 33
            }, this),
            "Đang lọc:"
          ] }, void 0, true, {
            fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
            lineNumber: 762,
            columnNumber: 29
          }, this),

            (f, i) => /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-white border border-stone-200 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full shadow-sm hover:border-gold/50 transition-colors group", children: [
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "text-[12px] font-bold text-stone-600", children: f.label }, void 0, false, {

                lineNumber: 768,
                columnNumber: 37
              }, this),
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                "button",
                {
                  onClick: () => {
                    const defaultSort = { key: "id", direction: "desc", phase: 1 };
                    setSortConfig(defaultSort);
                    let nextFilters = { ...filters };
                    if (f.key === "attr") {
                      const nextAttrs = { ...filters.attributes };
                      delete nextAttrs[f.attrId];
                      nextFilters.attributes = nextAttrs;
                    } else {
                      nextFilters[f.key] = "";
                    }
                    setFilters(nextFilters);
                    fetchProducts(1, nextFilters, defaultSort);
                  },

          columnNumber: 25

        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex items-center gap-2", children: [
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: "text-[11px] text-stone uppercase tracking-widest font-bold opacity-40 mr-2 italic", children: "Kéo thả để đổi thứ tự" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
            lineNumber: 961,
            columnNumber: 29
          }, this),
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
            "button",
            {
              onClick: () => {
                const savedColumns = localStorage.getItem("product_list_columns_default");
                const savedOrder = localStorage.getItem("product_column_order_default");
                const savedWidths = localStorage.getItem("product_list_column_widths_default");
                if (savedColumns) {
                  const cols = JSON.parse(savedColumns);
                  setVisibleColumns(cols);
                  localStorage.setItem("product_list_columns", JSON.stringify(cols));
                }
                if (savedOrder) {
                  const orderIds = JSON.parse(savedOrder);
                  const newAvailable = [...availableColumns].sort((a, b) => {
                    const idxA = orderIds.indexOf(a.id);
                    const idxB = orderIds.indexOf(b.id);
                    if (idxA === -1 && idxB === -1) return 0;
                    if (idxA === -1) return 1;
                    if (idxB === -1) return -1;
                    return idxA - idxB;
                  });
                  setAvailableColumns(newAvailable);
                  localStorage.setItem("product_column_order", JSON.stringify(orderIds));
                }
                if (savedWidths) {
                  const widths = JSON.parse(savedWidths);
                  setColumnWidths(widths);
                  localStorage.setItem("product_list_column_widths", JSON.stringify(widths));
                }
                if (!savedColumns && !savedOrder && !savedWidths) {
                  localStorage.removeItem("product_column_order");
                  localStorage.removeItem("product_list_columns");
                  localStorage.removeItem("product_list_column_widths");
                  localStorage.removeItem("product_list_sort");
                  window.location.reload();
                }
              },
              className: "bg-stone/5 text-stone text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-1.5 rounded-sm hover:bg-stone/20 transition-all flex items-center gap-1 border border-stone/20",
              children: [
                /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "material-symbols-outlined text-[16px]", children: "restart_alt" }, void 0, false, {
                  fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
                  lineNumber: 1004,
                  columnNumber: 33
                }, this),
                "MẶC ĐỊNH"
              ]
            },
            void 0,
            true,
            {
              fileName: "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx",
              lineNumber: 962,
              columnNumber: 29

                localStorage.setItem("product_list_column_widths_default", JSON.stringify(columnWidths));

                localStorage.setItem("product_column_order", JSON.stringify(availableColumns.map((c) => c.id)));

          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("tbody", { className: "bg-white", children: [
            products.map((product) => {
              const typeInfo = TYPE_LABELS[product.type] || TYPE_LABELS.simple;
              const imgUrl = getPrimaryImage(product);
              return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                "tr",
                {
                  onClick: (e) => {
                    if (e.target.closest("button") || e.target.closest("input")) return;
                    toggleSelectProduct(product.id);
                  },
                  onDoubleClick: (e) => {
                    if (e.target.closest("input")) return;
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    navigate(`/admin/products/edit/${product.id}`);
                  },

});
_c = ProductList;

var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "ProductList");
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
function $RefreshReg$(type, id) {
  return RefreshRuntime.register(type, "C:/xampp/htdocs/webnam/frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductList.jsx " + id);
}
function $RefreshSig$() {
  return RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform();
}
